01
Publishing & Books
Mass Volume Scaling — Net Profit Focus
Meta Ads · Sep 2024 – Mar 2026
6.53M

CVR
~3.7x

105–118

12,990+
Total Orders
Store Dashboard · 6.53M EGP Revenue
// Scaling Playbook
  • Interest-based: readers, self-dev, parenting & Islamic content
  • Video-first creative: book preview Reels as primary format
  • 3-tier funnel: TOF Cold → MOF Engaged → BOF Cart Abandoners
  • Looker Studio: live revenue vs. ad spend tracking
  • Aggressive CBO scaling after CPA stabilized at target
  • A/B testing: free shipping, bundle discounts, urgency copy

Meta Ads · 754 Campaigns · 10.99M EGP
// Acquisition Engine
  • WhatsApp-first conversion funnel for direct sales
  • Prospecting at scale: food & gifting interest audiences
  • Seasonal surge: Ramadan, Eid & corporate gifting peaks
  • Incremental bidding to maximize reach at lowest CPA
  • Largest single-account budget managed in career
  • Ongoing live campaigns with real-time optimization

ROAS Table · Peak 9.06x · 1.83M EGP
// Multi-Brand Playbook
  • Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns for catalogue scaling
  • CBO with Broad + LLA 1-3% parallel to Advantage+
  • Product-level ROAS tracking: cut losers, scale winners
  • Retargeting flows for cart abandoners with urgency deals
  • Scaled from 300 EGP/day to 30,000 EGP/day on top campaigns
  • Multi-brand: Step Up, Adidas, YSL, Olivia catalogues
